behavior_summary: Implements the 'U8P_MAPTELE::hatch' (Event 7 / enterFastArea) handler for a map-teleport item: when an actor triggers the item's area, the script chooses a destination based on the item's stored map/X/Y/Z and several global game-state flags, runs visual/sound/camera transition effects, optionally freezes the Avatar, teleports the Avatar (or NPC), and prevents immediate re-triggering.

Uses multiple conditional branches keyed by the item's stored map id, item frame (Z byte), and globals (MalchirTest, goToInnerSanctum, gotTheSymbols, arcadionMet, hydrosFree) to select among preset destination maps and coordinates and to alter side effects (for example, setting gotTheSymbols in one branch).

Guards re-entry via the global justTeleported (early return when set), sets justTeleported around the teleport to block immediate retriggers, and calls Item::touch and small helper spawns to complete item-side effects and pacing.
notable_control_flow: Early-exit guard: reads global justTeleported at function start and returns immediately if true (prevents retrigger).
Destination selection is a multi-way branch: primary discriminator is the item's map id (Npc::getMap) and secondary tests use Item::getX/Item::getY/Item::getZ plus global flags to pick presets.
Before teleport: optional setAvatarInStasis if Avatar not already in stasis, multiple spawn calls (FREE::1C19, FIRESPEL::1F65), and FadeToBlack to hide the map switch.

Teleport call: Npc::teleport(map,x,y,z/flags) performs the move; after teleport the script manipulates Camera (setCenterOn, move_to), FadeFromBlack, runs more spawns, calls Item::touch and sets/clears quest flags like gotTheSymbols in specific branches.
justTeleported is written (set) to block immediate re-trigger; some branches clear or set other globals (inferred behavior) depending on quest state.
open_questions: Exact mapping of itemZ (Item::getZ) frame values to individual teleport presets and appearance/frame meanings — frames are used as discriminators but the concrete mapping to places is inferred, not explicit.
Precise numeric teleport destination coordinates and map ids used in each branch (the disassembly indicates constants but the human-meaning of those constants is uncertain).
Exact runtime purpose of METHOD::0113 invocations (likely a short delay/animation helper) and the semantics of some repeated spawn/parameter patterns.
Whether the teleport affects NPCs other than the Avatar in every branch (behavior appears Avatar-focused but may apply to other actors).
Full gameplay intent behind writing gotTheSymbols in one branch (inferred quest progression) and the detailed effect of MalchirTest and goToInnerSanctum flags on destination selection.

main_function.name: U8P_MAPTELE::hatch
main_function.purpose: Respond to an actor entering the teleport item's trigger region: choose a destination (map/x/y/z) from the item's stored fields and game flags, perform transition effects (stasis, effects, fades, camera movement), teleport the actor, and manage re-trigger guards and quest-related flags.
entry_conditions: Event 7 (U8P_MAPTELE::hatch) — invoked when an actor enters the item's fast-area trigger (enterFastArea).
Function checks global justTeleported and returns early if that flag is set (prevents immediate retrigger).

function_map.name: U8P_MAPTELE::hatch
function_map.role: Event handler for the teleport item's area-enter; implements the teleport sequence and related side effects.

function_map.name: Npc::getMap
function_map.role: Read the item's/NPC's map id (used to pick teleport preset).

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Read stored item X (used to choose destination preset or coordinate).

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Read stored item Y (used to choose destination preset or coordinate).

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Read stored item Z/frame byte (used as discriminator for variants).

function_map.name: U8P_MAPTELE::getAvatarInStasis
function_map.role: Query whether Avatar is already frozen to avoid re-freezing.

function_map.name: Npc::isBusy
function_map.role: Check Actor busy state to coordinate helper spawns/delays.

function_map.name: spawn FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawn short-lived helper/timer processes for pacing effects.

function_map.name: spawn FIRESPEL::1F65
function_map.role: Spawn visual teleport flare/effect at coordinates.

function_map.name: U8P_MAPTELE::process FadeToBlack
function_map.role: Fade screen to black prior to teleport transition.

function_map.name: U8P_MAPTELE::process FadeFromBlack
function_map.role: Fade screen back after teleport and camera positioning.

function_map.name: Camera::setCenterOn
function_map.role: Adjust camera centering target during teleport sequence.

function_map.name: Camera::move_to
function_map.role: Animate camera to the teleport destination coordinates.

function_map.name: Npc::teleport
function_map.role: Perform the actual teleport of the NPC/Avatar to the chosen map and coordinates.

function_map.name: Item::touch
function_map.role: Trigger item-specific post-teleport side effects or consumption.

function_map.name: METHOD::0113
function_map.role: Appears to be a short delay/animation helper used in timing the effect sequence.

external_calls.purpose: Get the item/NPC's map id to decide which teleport preset to use.
Read stored X coordinate used to select destination presets and compute camera/effect offsets.
Read stored Y coordinate used to select destination presets and compute camera/effect offsets.
Read the item's frame/shape byte used as a discriminator among teleport variants.
Check whether Avatar is already frozen before applying stasis for the teleport.
Freeze the Avatar to prevent movement during the teleport transition (then unset later).
Decide whether to spawn helper processes or wait; coordinates pacing if actor is busy.
Spawn short helper/timer processes between visual steps to pace the sequence.
Spawn a visual teleport flare at computed coordinates before/after teleport.
Fade out before switching maps to provide a smooth visual transition.
Move the NPC/Avatar to the chosen destination map and coordinates.
Adjust camera centering target as part of the teleport transition (often cleared or set to new target).
Animate the camera to the post-teleport coordinates to reveal the new location correctly.
Fade the screen back in after the teleport and camera movement.
Trigger item-specific behavior or consumption after teleport completes.
Used as a short timed helper/delay during the effect sequence (inferred).

reads.name: justTeleported
reads.likely_effect: Guard against immediate re-triggering; if true the U8P_MAPTELE::hatch handler exits early.

reads.name: MalchirTest
reads.likely_effect: Used as a numeric threshold to select a special-case teleport branch (alters destination/behavior).

reads.name: goToInnerSanctum
reads.likely_effect: When set forces use of an inner-sanctum destination preset, overriding other choices.

reads.name: gotTheSymbols
reads.likely_effect: Read to influence branch behavior; in at least one branch it is set to indicate quest progression tied to this teleport.

reads.name: arcadionMet
reads.likely_effect: Used to choose between alternative teleport destinations based on plot progression.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Used to select among variant teleport destinations for a specific item/map case.

writes.name: justTeleported
writes.likely_effect: Set around the teleport to prevent the item from immediately re-triggering the teleport (cleared in some branches).

writes.name: gotTheSymbols
writes.likely_effect: Set in at least one branch as a quest/flag marker when the teleport grants or records 'symbols'.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements the 'U8P_MAPTELE::hatch' (Event 7 / enterFastArea) handler for a map-teleport item: when an actor triggers the item's area, the script chooses a destination based on the item's stored map/X/Y/Z and several global game-state flags, runs visual/sound/camera transition effects, optionally freezes the Avatar, teleports the Avatar (or NPC), and prevents immediate re-triggering.
